00020 
00027 #ifndef JELATINE_WRAPPERS_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_WRAPPERS_H (1)
00029 
00030 #if HAVE_CONFIG_H
00031 #   include <config.h>
00032 #endif // HAVE_CONFIG_H
00033 
00034 // Thread-related includes go first
00035 
00036 #if JEL_THREAD_POSIX
00037 #   include <pthread.h>
00038 #elif JEL_THREAD_PTH
00039 #   include <pth.h>
00040 #endif
00041 
00042 // More thread-related definitions
00043 #if !defined(HAVE_PTHREAD_YIELD) && !defined(HAVE_PTHREAD_YIELD_NP)
00044 #   if HAVE_SCHED_H
00045 #       define NEED_SCHED_H (1)
00046 #   endif // HAVE_SCHED_H
00047 #endif // !defined(HAVE_PTHREAD_YIELD) && !defined(HAVE_PTHREAD_YIELD_NP)
00048 
00049 /* Adapt the NDEBUG macro to the convention used by the autotools of defining
00050  * all existing macros to 1 in order to simplify checking */
00051 
00052 #ifdef NDEBUG
00053 #   undef NDEBUG
00054 #   define NDEBUG (1)
00055 #endif // NDEBUG
00056 
00057 #include <assert.h>
00058 #include <setjmp.h>
00059 #include <stdarg.h>
00060 #include <stddef.h>
00061 #include <stdio.h>
00062 #include <stdlib.h>
00063 #include <string.h>
00064 
00065 #if HAVE_INTTYPES_H
00066 #   include <inttypes.h>
00067 #endif // HAVE_INTTYPES_H
00068 
00069 // Boolean type wrapper
00070 
00086 #if HAVE_STDBOOL_H
00087 #   include <stdbool.h>
00088 #else
00089 #   if !HAVE__BOOL
00090 #       ifdef __cplusplus
00091 typedef bool _Bool;
00092 #       else
00093 typedef unsigned int _Bool;
00094 #       endif // __cplusplus
00095 #   endif // !HAVE_BOOL
00096 #   define bool _Bool
00097 #   define false (0)
00098 #   define true (1)
00099 #   define __bool_true_false_are_defined (1)
00100 #endif // HAVE_STDBOOL_H
00101 
00102 #if !HAVE_PTRDIFF_T
00103 
00106 typedef intptr_t ptrdiff_t;
00107 #endif // !HAVE_PTRDIFF_T
00108 
00112 #if SIZEOF_LONG == 8
00113 typedef uint64_t jword_t;
00114 #else
00115 typedef uint32_t jword_t;
00116 #endif // SIZEOF_LONG == 8
00117 
00120 // Adapt WORDS_BIGENDIAN and FLOAT_WORDS_BIGENDIAN
00121 
00122 #ifndef WORDS_BIGENDIAN
00123 #   define WORDS_BIGENDIAN (0)
00124 #endif // !WORDS_BIGENDIAN
00125 
00126 #ifndef FLOAT_WORDS_BIGENDIAN
00127 #   define FLOAT_WORDS_BIGENDIAN (0)
00128 #endif // !FLOAT_WORDS_BIGENDIAN
00129 
00131 #define JNULL ((uintptr_t) NULL)
00132 
00133 // Floating point support
00134 
00135 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00136 
00137 #if HAVE_MATH_H
00138 #   include <math.h>
00139 #endif // HAVE_MATH_H
00140 
00141 #ifndef NAN
00142 #   if HAVE___BUILTIN_NAN
00143 #       define NAN __builtin_nan("")
00144 #   else
00145 static inline float __nan( void )
00146 {
00147     uint32_t nan_bits = 0x7fc00000;
00148     float nan;
00149 
00150     memcpy(&nan, &nan_bits, sizeof(float));
00151     return nan;
00152 }
00153 #       define NAN (__nan())
00154 #   endif
00155 #endif // NAN
00156 
00157 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00158 
00159 // Time support
00160 
00161 #if TIME_WITH_SYS_TIME
00162 #   include <sys/time.h>
00163 #   include <time.h>
00164 #else
00165 #   if HAVE_SYS_TIME_H
00166 #       include <sys/time.h>
00167 #   else
00168 #       include <time.h>
00169 #   endif
00170 #endif
00171 
00172 #if !HAVE_VA_COPY
00173 #   if HAVE___VA_COPY
00174 #       define va_copy(x, y) __va_copy(x, y)
00175 #   else // HAVE___VA_COPY
00176 #       define va_copy(x, y) memcpy(&x, &x, sizeof(va_list))
00177 #   endif // HAVE___VA_COPY
00178 #endif // !HAVE_VA_COPY
00179 
00180 /******************************************************************************
00181  * Compiler features                                                          *
00182  ******************************************************************************/
00183 
00184 #if HAVE_FUNC_ATTRIBUTE_CONST
00185 #   define ATTRIBUTE_CONST __attribute__((const))
00186 #else
00187 #   define ATTRIBUTE_CONST
00188 #endif // HAVE_FUNC_ATTRIBUTE_CONST
00189 
00190 #if HAVE_FUNC_ATTRIBUTE_MALLOC
00191 #   define ATTRIBUTE_MALLOC __attribute__((malloc))
00192 #else
00193 #   define ATTRIBUTE_MALLOC
00194 #endif // HAVE_FUNC_ATTRIBUTE_MALLOC
00195 
00196 #if HAVE_FUNC_ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN
00197 #   define ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN __attribute__((noreturn))
00198 #else
00199 #   define ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN
00200 #endif // HAVE_FUNC_ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN
00201 
00202 #if HAVE_FUNC_ATTRIBUTE_PURE
00203 #   define ATTRIBUTE_PURE __attribute__((pure))
00204 #else
00205 #   define ATTRIBUTE_PURE
00206 #endif // HAVE_FUNC_ATTRIBUTE_PURE
00207 
00208 #if HAVE_VAR_ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED
00209 #   define ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED __attribute__((unused))
00210 #else
00211 #   define ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED
00212 #endif // HAVE_VAR_ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED
00213 
00216 #endif // !JELATINE_WRAPPERS_H
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:38:46 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
